page.title: Preview
page.unavailableTitle: This page is no longer available
page.unavailableDescription: It was deleted in Notion, or the integration lost access.
page.introText: Showing how your page will be split into cards. Blocks marked in blue become cards — adjust them with
page.alreadyConverting: This page is already converting — check Downloads in a moment.
page.convertFailed: Could not start the conversion. Try again in a moment.
page.emptyTitle: Nothing to turn into cards yet
page.emptyDescription: 2anki makes a card from every toggle on this page — the toggle title becomes the question, what's inside becomes the answer. This page has no toggles yet. Add a few in Notion, then preview again.

block.tooltipRecurse: Opens as a sub-page — click to explore

database.title: Database preview
database.unavailableTitle: This database is no longer available
database.unavailableDescription: It may have been deleted or moved in Notion.
database.readError: We couldn't read this database. Check that 2anki still has access in Notion, then try again.
database.sampleFraming_one: Preview of the first {{count}} row. Converting to Anki includes every row in this database.
database.sampleFraming_other: Preview of the first {{count}} rows. Converting to Anki includes every row in this database.
database.noRows: This database has no rows yet.
database.rowCapFooter_one: Showing {{count}} row here. Every row in this database is included when you convert.
database.rowCapFooter_other: Showing {{count}} rows here. Every row in this database is included when you convert.

apkg.emptyDescription: This deck has no cards to preview.

share.helper: Anyone with the link can preview the cards and download the deck. They can't edit it.
share.stopConfirm: Stop sharing this deck? The link will stop working.
share.listInLibraryHelper: Anyone can find and view this deck. Your Notion account stays private.
share.listedAs: Listed in the public library as {{title}}
share.publishFailed: Couldn't update the library listing. Try again.

sharedLibrary.subtitle: Decks people made public. Open one, then make your own.
sharedLibrary.emptyDescription: Share one of yours to start the library.
sharedLibrary.loadFailed: Couldn't load the shared library. Try again.
